data.name: Armored Suit Solgante
data.detailed_description:
After years of war, the world nations are finally at peace, having joined together to create the International Federation. Not everyone is happy with the new government, however; a terrorist group known as the Free States continues to fight for independence.

Radulta, the strongest military nation in the world, is tasked with hunting down the remnants of the Free States. As Radulta's top armored suit pilot, this mission falls to you... until you're accused of being a double agent for the enemy, that is.

Will you succeed in balancing your duties and your search for the truth? The only ones you can trust are yourself, your mech, and your loving wife, Eleanor. But whoever set you up will surely have their sights trained on her as well, and it could only be a matter of time...

Protect your wife and your country! Fight for justice and defend everything you care for, or you might just lose it all!

A top-down combat-based game where you must dodge enemy fire while traversing various environments. Different weapons may be more efficient against different enemies you encounter.

Between battles, explore the city around the base to see what's changed, especially with your wife.

Modify Armored Suit Loadout

Choose your weapon between machine guns, rifles, or grenade launchers, each with their own stats. Enjoy New Game+ to unlock them all!

Mission System

Complete missions in action-based combat. Dodge enemy fire and shoot back from a distance. Don't let your armor get too damaged! Your mission fails when your armor's gone.

Multiple Paths to Traverse

Will you stay loyal to Colonel Daston, work to find the true traitor with Sergeant Harry, or take advantage of the robotics resources of the Sharkam Corporation? Who is truly on your side?
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: Play as a mech pilot battling against threats to your nation. But in your struggle to defeat the terrorist forces, you become implicated in one of the very schemes you're fighting against...
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and GapTax, All Rights Reserved.
